items.claim: Conor McGregor's mental state may be compromised due to his long layoff.
Conor McGregor is unlikely to return to his previous level of performance after a five-year layoff.
items.quote: Now, is he going to come back the same? I'll be damned. I mean, you know, kind of doubt it
my boy saying what is Johnny the Greek thing with pinos and loading on Almeida's chin.
